code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
let n = words.len()
while i < n
  let w = match words.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let first = match string.byte_at(w, 0)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
  let new_word = if first >= 97 and first <= 122
    let upper = first - 32
    let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
    "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
  else
    w
  end
  if i == 0
    result = new_word
  else
    result = "#{result} #{new_word}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
